name: simple-playwright-framework
description: A simple framework for non-technical users to write Playwright tests

scripts.test:gherkin: npm run generate-steps && cucumber-js features/**/*.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require steps/**/*.ts --format progress
scripts.test:gherkin:headed: npm run generate-steps && HEADLESS=false cucumber-js features/**/*.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require steps/**/*.ts --format progress
